author: 0xjuliaglxy
content: Where can I find a list of all the current tracking items CL/EL for zkEVM L1. ideally, milestones, relevant EIPs, and current status? Is this the best there is to gain an overview of the L1 zkEVM project? https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/issues/2183 Thanks 🙏

author: 0xjuliaglxy
content: Thank you. Is this channel <#1451216716062523507> for all the CL aspects of zkEVM, ie. consuming the attester verifier proofs at the end, and the EL-side of things (witness, proof generation, etc.) is addressed in <#1375154553812422736> ?  Thanks:)
